text: Courage is starting over again.
author: Romain Rolland

text: What matters is keeping the game alive.
author: Albert Camus

text: Every mistake sketches the next progress.
author: Confucius

text: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb

text: Nothing is lost as long as there’s still one more try.
author: S. Beckett

text: Talent is built through repetition.
author: Aristotle

text: The end of one round is the beginning of another.
author: Montaigne

text: Patience is a force that scores points.
author: La Fontaine

text: Success is going from failure to failure without losing enthusiasm.
author: Winston Churchill

text: I never lose. I either win or I learn.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Failure is simply the opportunity to begin again, this time more intelligently.
author: Henry Ford

text: Defeat is not the worst of failures. Not having tried is the real failure.
author: George Edward Woodberry

text: Mistakes are a wonderful opportunity to learn.
author: Jane Nelsen

text: The greatest game of the mind ever invented: the more you learn it, the more you enjoy it.
author: Garry Kasparov

text: Man is fully human only when he plays.
author: Friedrich Schiller

text: The game has no meaning other than itself.
author: Roger Caillois

text: Attention is the rarest and purest form of generosity.
author: Simone Weil

text: Every difficulty encountered must become an opportunity for new progress.
author: Proverb

text: Perseverance conquers all.
author: Proverb

text: The greatest victory in life is not never falling, but rising after every fall.
author: Proverb

text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

text: You learn little from victory, but much from defeat.
author: Japanese Proverb

text: Defeat is innovative, victory is conservative.
author: Bernard Werber

text: There is only one answer to defeat, and that is victory.
author: Winston Churchill

text: A victory weakens a people, a defeat awakens another.
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

text: Learning without thinking is in vain, thinking without learning is dangerous.
author: Confucius

text: Knowledge is acquired through experience; everything else is just information.
author: Albert Einstein

text: There is only one way to fail: to give up before succeeding.
author: Thomas Edison

text: Failure is the foundation of success.
author: Lao Tzu

text: Failures teach you to be patient and disciplined.
author: Judit Polgár

text: The outcome of a game is uncertain, the pleasure it brings is unquestionable.
author: Malay Proverb
